title: ExcelJS not defined error
author: HarithaKR
body:
Hi. I have used excel js min file as library and using new ExcelJS command. It was working earlier. 
I added script tag with the cdn link of amd js 
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/systemjs@6.9.0/dist/extras/amd.min.js"></script>
If I add this, then I get the error ExcelJS is not defined.  Is there any link with amd file with ExcelJS? Other library files are loading fine with this.
When I added excel js package and imported, it works fine.
